Status.description: The current status of the resource tags for telemetry feature (Running, Stopped, or Impaired).

AwsResourceExplorerManagedViewArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon Web Services Resource Explorer managed view used for resource tags for telemetry, if the feature is enabled.

Status.description: The onboarding status of the telemetry config feature.

FailureReason.description: Describes the reason for the failure status. The field will only be populated if Status is FAILED_START or FAILED_STOP.

Status.description: The onboarding status of the telemetry config feature for the organization.

FailureReason.description: This field describes the reason for the failure status. The field will only be populated if Status is FAILED_START or FAILED_STOP.

NextToken.description: A token to resume pagination of results.

RuleName.description: The name of the organization centralization rule.

RuleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the organization centralization rule.

CreatorAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services Account that created the organization centralization rule.

CreatedTimeStamp.description: The timestamp when the organization centralization rule was created.

CreatedRegion.description: The Amazon Web Services region where the organization centralization rule was created.

LastUpdateTimeStamp.description: The timestamp when the organization centralization rule was last updated.

RuleHealth.description: The health status of the organization centralization rule.

FailureReason.description: The reason why an organization centralization rule is marked UNHEALTHY.

DestinationAccountId.description: The primary destination account of the organization centralization rule.

DestinationRegion.description: The primary destination region of the organization centralization rule.

TelemetryConfigurations.description: A list of telemetry configurations for Amazon Web Services resources supported by telemetry config in the caller's account.

NextToken.description: The token for the next set of items to return. A previous call generates this token.

AccountIdentifier.description: The account ID which contains the resource managed in telemetry configuration. An example of a valid account ID is 012345678901.

TelemetryConfigurationState.description: The configuration state for the resource, for example { Logs: NotApplicable; Metrics: Enabled; Traces: NotApplicable; }.

ResourceType.description: The type of resource, for example Amazon Web Services::EC2::Instance.

ResourceIdentifier.description: The identifier of the resource, for example i-0b22a22eec53b9321.

ResourceTags.description: Tags associated with the resource, for example { Name: "ExampleInstance", Environment: "Development" }.

LastUpdateTimeStamp.description: The timestamp of the last change to the telemetry configuration for the resource. For example, 1728679196318.

TelemetryConfigurations.description: A list of telemetry configurations for Amazon Web Services resources supported by telemetry config in the organization.

NextToken.description: The token for the next set of items to return. A previous call provides this token.

AccountIdentifier.description: The account ID which contains the resource managed in telemetry configuration. An example of a valid account ID is 012345678901.

TelemetryConfigurationState.description: The configuration state for the resource, for example { Logs: NotApplicable; Metrics: Enabled; Traces: NotApplicable; }.

ResourceIdentifier.description: The identifier of the resource, for example i-0b22a22eec53b9321.

ResourceTags.description: Tags associated with the resource, for example { Name: "ExampleInstance", Environment: "Development" }.

LastUpdateTimeStamp.description: The timestamp of the last change to the telemetry configuration for the resource. For example, 1728679196318.

RuleName.description: The name of the organization centralization rule.

RuleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the organization centralization rule.

CreatorAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services Account that created the organization centralization rule.

CreatedTimeStamp.description: The timestamp when the organization centralization rule was created.

CreatedRegion.description: The Amazon Web Services region where the organization centralization rule was created.

LastUpdateTimeStamp.description: The timestamp when the organization centralization rule was last updated.

RuleHealth.description: The health status of the organization centralization rule.

FailureReason.description: The reason why an organization centralization rule is marked UNHEALTHY.

CentralizationRule.description: The configuration details for the organization centralization rule.

Source.description: Configuration determining the source of the telemetry data to be centralized.

Regions.description: The list of source regions from which telemetry data should be centralized.

Scope.description: The organizational scope from which telemetry data should be centralized, specified using organization id, accounts or organizational unit ids.

SourceLogsConfiguration.description: Log specific configuration for centralization source log groups.

LogGroupSelectionCriteria.description: The selection criteria that specifies which source log groups to centralize. The selection criteria uses the same format as OAM link filters.

EncryptedLogGroupStrategy.description: A strategy determining whether to centralize source log groups that are encrypted with customer managed KMS keys (CMK). ALLOW will consider CMK encrypted source log groups for centralization while SKIP will skip CMK encrypted source log groups from centralization.

Destination.description: Configuration determining where the telemetry data should be centralized, backed up, as well as encryption configuration for the primary and backup destinations.

Region.description: The primary destination region to which telemetry data should be centralized.

Account.description: The destination account (within the organization) to which the telemetry data should be centralized.

DestinationLogsConfiguration.description: Log specific configuration for centralization destination log groups.

LogsEncryptionConfiguration.description: The encryption configuration for centralization destination log groups.

EncryptionStrategy.description: Configuration that determines the encryption strategy of the destination log groups. CUSTOMER_MANAGED uses the configured KmsKeyArn to encrypt newly created destination log groups.

KmsKeyArn.description: KMS Key arn belonging to the primary destination account and region, to encrypt newly created central log groups in the primary destination.

EncryptionConflictResolutionStrategy.description: Conflict resolution strategy for centralization if the encryption strategy is set to CUSTOMER_MANAGED and the destination log group is encrypted with an AWS_OWNED KMS Key. ALLOW lets centralization go through while SKIP prevents centralization into the destination log group.

BackupConfiguration.description: Configuration defining the backup region and an optional KMS key for the backup destination.

Region.description: Logs specific backup destination region within the primary destination account to which log data should be centralized.

KmsKeyArn.description: KMS Key arn belonging to the primary destination account and backup region, to encrypt newly created central log groups in the backup destination.

RuleName.description: The name of the telemetry rule.

RuleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the telemetry rule.

CreatedTimeStamp.description: The timestamp when the telemetry rule was created.

LastUpdateTimeStamp.description: The timestamp when the telemetry rule was last updated.

TelemetryRule.description: The configuration details of the telemetry rule.

ResourceType.description: The type of Amazon Web Services resource to configure telemetry for (e.g., "AWS::EC2::VPC").

TelemetryType.description: The type of telemetry to collect (Logs, Metrics, or Traces).

DestinationConfiguration.description: Configuration specifying where and how the telemetry data should be delivered.

DestinationType.description: The type of destination for the telemetry data (e.g., "Amazon CloudWatch Logs", "S3").

DestinationPattern.description: The pattern used to generate the destination path or name, supporting macros like <resourceId> and <accountId>.

RetentionInDays.description: The number of days to retain the telemetry data in the destination.

VPCFlowLogParameters.description: Configuration parameters specific to VPC Flow Logs when VPC is the resource type.

LogFormat.description: The format in which VPC Flow Log entries should be logged.

TrafficType.description: The type of traffic to log (ACCEPT, REJECT, or ALL).

MaxAggregationInterval.description: The maximum interval in seconds between the capture of flow log records.

Scope.description: The organizational scope to which the rule applies, specified using accounts or organizational units.

SelectionCriteria.description: Criteria for selecting which resources the rule applies to, such as resource tags.

DestinationPattern.description: The pattern used to generate the destination path or name, supporting macros like <resourceId> and <accountId>.

RetentionInDays.description: The number of days to retain the telemetry data in the destination.

VPCFlowLogParameters.description: Configuration parameters specific to VPC Flow Logs when VPC is the resource type.

LogFormat.description: The format in which VPC Flow Log entries should be logged.

TrafficType.description: The type of traffic to log (ACCEPT, REJECT, or ALL).

MaxAggregationInterval.description: The maximum interval in seconds between the capture of flow log records.

Scope.description: The organizational scope to which the rule applies, specified using accounts or organizational units.

SelectionCriteria.description: Criteria for selecting which resources the rule applies to, such as resource tags.

Tags.description: The list of tags associated with the telemetry rule resource.
